project.name: codeProxy
project.description: Admin dashboard for CliRelay - a proxy server wrapping multiple AI services (Gemini CLI, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code, etc.) as OpenAI/Gemini/Claude compatible APIs. Built with React 19, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

nodes.name: deploy.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that deploys the frontend bundle to a production server via SSH/SCP on push to the dev branch. Cleans old static files, uploads dist/, writes a version marker, and verifies the deployment by checking for key files and routes.

nodes.name: pr-test-build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, unit tests, production build, and bundle diff analysis on pull requests targeting dev or main branches. Uses Bun with caching for faster installs.

nodes.name: rebuild-clirelay.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that dispatches a workflow on the external CliRelay repository (kittors/CliRelay) to trigger a Docker image rebuild when codeProxy changes on main or dev branches.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the frontend, packages it into panel-dist.zip, and creates a GitHub release with release notes when a version tag (v*) is pushed.

nodes.name: build-and-deploy
nodes.summary: Main deployment job that checks out code, installs deps with Bun, computes UI version from git SHA, builds, and deploys via SCP to the server.

nodes.name: test-build
nodes.summary: CI job that runs lint, test:ci, build, and bundle:diff on PRs targeting dev/main.

nodes.name: dispatch
nodes.summary: Single-step job that triggers the CliRelay docker-publish workflow on the external repository using gh CLI.

nodes.name: release
nodes.summary: Release job that builds the frontend, packages dist into a zip, and creates a GitHub release with release notes.

nodes.name: version.ts
nodes.summary: API client for version checking. Provides versionApi with a checkLatest method to fetch the latest version info.

nodes.name: vertex.ts
nodes.summary: API client for Vertex AI credential import. Provides vertexApi with importCredential method using FormData for uploading credential files.

nodes.name: index.ts (assets)

nodes.summary: Exports a single inline JPEG logo as a constant.

nodes.name: ProviderLogos.tsx
nodes.summary: SVG icon components for AI providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Vertex AI) using official simple-icons SVG paths.

nodes.name: VendorIcon.tsx
nodes.summary: Dynamic vendor icon component that maps model ID prefixes to appropriate light/dark SVG icons for various AI providers (Claude, Codex, DeepSeek, Gemini, GLM, GPT, Grok, iFlow, Kimi, Kiro, MiniMax, Qwen, Vertex).

nodes.name: package.json (domain)
nodes.summary: Package configuration for @code-proxy/domain. Declares Chart.js dependency for charting functionality.

nodes.name: authFiles.ts
nodes.summary: Core domain logic for auth file management. Contains types (AuthFileModelItem, AuthFileModelOwnerGroup, AuthFilesUiState, AuthFilesDataCache, etc.), constants (storage keys, page sizes, status filters), and extensive utility functions for reading/writing UI state, data caching, file formatting, status filtering, subscription handling, tag management, quota preview, and usage index building.

nodes.name: types.ts (auth-files)
nodes.summary: Type definitions for auth file domain. Includes AuthFileRestriction, AuthFileItem, EntityStatPoint, EntityStatsResponse, OAuthModelAliasEntry, and AuthFileSubscriptionPeriod types.

nodes.name: ccswitchImport.ts
nodes.summary: Domain logic for CcSwitch import functionality. Defines client configurations (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), model mappings, base URL normalization, usage script generation, default model selection, import config resolution, and ccswitch:// protocol URL building for one-click provider imports.

nodes.name: ccswitchImportCompatibility.ts
nodes.summary: Compatibility checking utilities for CcSwitch import configuration. Provides functions to normalize permission lists, get target models from config, and check if a config matches allowed models or API key permission entries.

nodes.name: ccswitchImportConfigList.ts
nodes.summary: Manages CcSwitch import configuration list items. Defines CcSwitchImportConfigListItem and CcSwitchModelMapping interfaces, provides functions to create, normalize, derive settings from, and manage route paths for CcSwitch import configs across client types (claude, codex, gemini).

nodes.name: ccswitchImportLinks.ts
nodes.summary: Builds CcSwitch import URLs and settings by combining config list items with import settings. Functions include appending route paths, building settings for a specific config, and generating import URLs for config items.

nodes.name: ccswitchImportSettings.ts
nodes.summary: Defines CcSwitch import settings types (CcSwitchClaudeAuthField, CcSwitchClientImportSettings, CcSwitchImportSettings), default settings for claude/codex/gemini clients, and normalization functions for endpoint paths, auth fields, auto-intervals, and the full settings object.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file that re-exports all public symbols from ccswitch (import, configList, compatibility, links, settings), auth-files (authFiles, types), quota, and usage modules, plus specifically re-exports isRuntimeOnlyAuthFile and normalizeAuthIndexValue.

nodes.name: helpers.ts
nodes.summary: Model helper utilities: normalizes provider keys (lowercase/trim), matches model IDs against glob-like patterns, resolves file types from AuthFileItem (codex/kimi/other), and manages AuthFilesModelOwnerGroupMap via localStorage.

nodes.name: providerUsage.ts
nodes.summary: Provider usage tracking utilities: detects raw API keys/tokens in text via regex, computes FNV-1a 64-bit hex fingerprints for keys, normalizes usage source IDs (key/masked/text prefixes), builds candidate source IDs, calculates status bar data (20 blocks over 200 min window), and merges key stat buckets.

nodes.name: builders.ts
nodes.summary: Builder functions for constructing quota data structures: pickEarlierResetTime, minNullableNumber, Gemini CLI quota bucket grouping with model deduplication and ordering, antigravity quota info extraction, model lookup by ID/name, and antigravity quota group building.

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Quota constants including type color themes for providers (qwen, gemini, claude, codex, antigravity, kiro, iflow, etc.), API URLs and request headers for Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude, Codex, and Kiro (AWS CodeWhisperer), plus Gemini CLI model group definitions and lookup maps.

nodes.name: formatters.ts
nodes.summary: Formatting functions for quota display: formatQuotaResetTime (date locale string), formatUnixSeconds, formatCodexResetLabel (from window data), createStatusError (error with optional status), and getStatusFromError extraction.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting all quota submodules: constants, parsers, formatters, builders, resolvers, and validators.

nodes.name: parsers.ts
nodes.summary: Normalization and parsing functions for quota payloads: normalizes auth index, string, number, Gemini CLI model IDs, quota fractions, and plan types. Decodes base64 URL payloads, parses JWT ID tokens, and parses quota payloads for Antigravity, Claude, Codex, Gemini CLI, Kiro, and Kiro error responses.

nodes.name: resolvers.ts
nodes.summary: Resolver functions that extract data from AuthFileItem objects: Codex ChatGPT account ID (from direct fields, metadata, attributes, or JWT id_token), Codex plan type, and Gemini CLI project ID (from account field with parenthetical extraction).

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Type definitions for the quota system: theme colors, quota status/items/state, Gemini CLI bucket/group/payload types, Antigravity quota info and group, Codex usage window/rate limit/payload types, Claude usage window/extra usage/payload types, and Kiro subscription/trial/breakdown/payload types.

nodes.name: validators.ts
nodes.summary: Validation and type-checking functions: resolves auth provider from AuthFileItem, checks if a file is Antigravity, Claude, Claude OAuth, Codex, Gemini CLI, Kiro, runtime-only, or disabled, and checks if a Gemini CLI model should be ignored based on prefix.

nodes.name: chartConfig.ts
nodes.summary: Chart.js configuration utilities: sparkline options (responsive, no tooltips/legend), buildChartOptions with theme (dark/light) and mobile awareness for axis ticks, colors, tooltips, and getHourChartMinWidth for responsive hourly charts.

nodes.name: charts.ts
nodes.summary: Chart data building functions: hex-to-RGB conversion, gradient generation, buildHourlySeriesByModel (hourly request/token counts per model), buildDailySeriesByModel (daily aggregation), and buildChartData (combines series into Chart.js ready datasets with color assignments).

nodes.name: details.ts
nodes.summary: Usage detail processing: filterUsageByTimeRange (filters by time window across API/model hierarchy), collectUsageDetails (flattens nested usage into UsageDetail array), extractTotalTokens (sums all token types), calculateTokenBreakdown (cached+reasoning), calculateRecentPerMinuteRates (RPM/TPM), getModelNamesFromUsage.

nodes.name: formatters.ts
nodes.summary: Number and date formatting utilities: formatPerMinuteValue (adaptive precision), formatCompactNumber (K/M suffixes), formatUsd, formatHourLabel (MM-DD HH:00), formatDayLabel (YYYY-MM-DD).

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting all usage submodules (chartConfig, charts, details, formatters, pricing, sanitize, shared, status) and maskApiKey.

nodes.name: maskApiKey.ts
nodes.summary: Simple API key masking utility: shows first 2 and last 2 characters of a key with asterisks in between (minimum 10 asterisks, configurable).

nodes.name: pricing.ts
nodes.summary: Cost calculation system: calculateCost (per-model token-based or per-call pricing), calculateTotalCost, loadModelPrices/saveModelPrices (localStorage), getApiStats (per-endpoint statistics with cost), getModelStats (per-model aggregated statistics).

nodes.name: sanitize.ts
nodes.summary: Usage data sanitization: detects raw API keys/secrets via multiple regex patterns (key-like tokens, query params, headers, Bearer tokens), computes FNV-1a 64-bit key fingerprints, normalizes usage source IDs with prefixes (k:/m:/t:), builds candidate source IDs, and masks sensitive values in strings.

nodes.name: shared.ts
nodes.summary: Shared types and constants for usage system: KeyStatBucket, KeyStats, TokenBreakdown, RateStats, ModelPrice, UsageDetail, ApiStats, UsageTimeRange. Constants for tokens-per-price-unit, model price storage key, time range durations. Utility functions isRecord and getApisRecord.

nodes.name: status.ts
nodes.summary: Status bar and service health computation: calculateStatusBarData (20 blocks over 200 min with optional filters), calculateServiceHealthData (7x96 grid over 7 days), computeKeyStats (success/failure by source and auth index), token breakdown series (hourly/daily), cost series (hourly/daily).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project documentation for Code Proxy Admin Dashboard. Describes the web-based management panel for CliRelay (CLI Proxy API). Covers 13 management screens including Dashboard, Monitor Center, Request Logs, AI Providers, Auth Files, OAuth, API Keys, Models, Quota, Config, System, and Live Logs. Defines tech stack (React 19, Vite 7, TypeScript 5.9, Tailwind CSS 4.1, Bun 1.2), project structure, API endpoints, and setup instructions.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Main HTML entry point for the admin panel application. Includes dark mode detection via localStorage/system preference, an animated loading screen with glowing effects and spinning ring, and loads the main TypeScript entry point (/src/main.tsx) as a module. Uses Inter font from Google Fonts. Title: 'Code Proxy 绠＄悊鍚庡彴'.

nodes.name: manage.html
nodes.summary: Management HTML entry point for the admin dashboard. Mirrors index.html with the same dark mode detection, loading screen with glowing effects, and spinning ring animation. Loads the management TypeScript entry point (/src/manage-entry.tsx) as a module. Title: 'Code Proxy Admin Dashboard'.

nodes.name: oxlintrc.json
nodes.summary: Oxlint linter configuration for the project. Enables TypeScript, React, and JSX-a11y plugins. Sets correctness, suspicious, and performance categories to 'warn', style to 'off'. Enforces specific rules: react/jsx-key and react/no-unknown-property as errors, jsx-a11y/alt-text and jsx-a11y/label-has-associated-control as warnings.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root package configuration for the code-proxy-admin monorepo. Defines workspaces (apps/*, pages, features/*, packages/*), scripts (dev, build, lint, test, e2e), and dependencies. Key deps: React 19.2, react-router-dom 7.13, zustand 5, echarts 6, framer-motion, i18next, axios, tailwindcss 4.1. Dev deps: TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7.3, Playwright, Vitest, oxlint, Sass. Uses Bun 1.2 as package manager.

nodes.name: tsconfig.base.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript base configuration. Sets ES2022 target, Bundler module resolution, strict mode, react-jsx, and defines workspace-wide path aliases for @/*, @app/*, @pages/*, @features/*, and all @code-proxy/* packages.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json

nodes.name: package.json scripts
nodes.summary: Build and development scripts: dev (bun workspaces filter), build, preview, lint (oxlint), format (oxfmt), check (lint+boundary+build+diff), boundary:imports, bundle:diff, test, test:ci, test:watch, e2e (playwright).

nodes.name: package.json workspaces

nodes.name: variables.scss

nodes.name: mixins.scss
nodes.summary: SCSS mixins for responsive breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop), flexbox centering, single and multi-line text ellipsis truncation, and button reset styles. Depends on variables.scss for breakpoint values and the primary color.

nodes.name: reset.scss
nodes.summary: CSS reset/normalize styles: box-sizing border-box on all elements, full-height html/body, font smoothing, root element sizing, form element font inheritance, link color reset, and list-style removal.

nodes.name: themes.scss
nodes.summary: CSS custom property definitions for light and dark themes. Light theme uses :root with white/light backgrounds and dark text. Dark theme (triggered by [data-theme='dark']) uses near-black backgrounds and light text. Defines background colors, text colors, border colors, semantic colors (primary, success, warning, error), badge colors, shadows, and accent variables.

nodes.name: global.scss
nodes.summary: Global styles entry point that imports all other SCSS partials (variables, mixins, reset, themes, components, layout). Adds default cursor styles for interactive elements, body background/color with theme transition, modal-open overflow locking, custom scrollbar styling, and utility classes (.container, .flex-center, .text-ellipsis, fade-enter/fade-exit animations).

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Main CSS entry file using Tailwind CSS v4 (@import 'tailwindcss'). Configures Tailwind typography plugin, scans multiple source directories (apps/admin-panel/src, pages, features, packages), defines a dark variant, custom font-family theme. Adds utility classes for hidden scrollbars (.scrollbar-hidden, .table-scrollbar), dark mode scrollbar styles, fade-in-up animation, and decorative animated layers for the image generation page (.image-generation-dots-layer, .image-generation-flow-layer) with keyframe animations.

nodes.name: layout.scss
nodes.summary: Application layout styles defining the app shell flexbox structure, sticky main header with brand logo, sidebar toggle, brand title, language menu, connection status, responsive mobile sidebar (slide-in drawer), main content area, and a grid system. Includes collapsed sidebar mode and mobile-responsive adaptations.

nodes.name: components.scss
nodes.summary: Comprehensive component stylesheet covering the UI component library: buttons (primary, secondary, ghost, danger variants with sm/full modifiers), form inputs and form groups, cards and card headers, status badges (success, warning, error, muted), notification container with enter/exit animations, toggle switches, pills, loading spinners, modal system (overlay, scale-in/collapse animations, header/body/footer sections, floating close button), empty states, header input lists, item rows, latency badges, error boxes, filter grids, table layouts, pagination bars, stat cards, and log viewer styling.

nodes.name: Tailwind CSS v4 Configuration

nodes.name: Light Theme (:root)

nodes.name: Dark Theme ([data-theme='dark'])

nodes.name: App Shell Header & Sidebar Layout
nodes.summary: Defines the .app-shell, .main-header, .sidebar, .main-body, .content, and .main-content layout classes. Header is sticky with brand logo, sidebar toggle, connection status. Sidebar supports collapsed mode and mobile drawer. Content area fills remaining space with overflow handling.

nodes.name: Proxy Pool Management Implementation Plan
